title: Refined Materials
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM MiningRefined WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Type_Localised, Type) AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM MiningRefined WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} unit(s) refined from asteroids during the report period. Your refined output is your mining resume — LTDs and Void Opals dominate lucrative hauls while plain iron suggests a very different ring session.
details.help: MiningRefined fires for each refining cycle. Count is the units extracted per cycle. total drives the title as the volume metric.

tagLines: Refined material inventory updated. The relevant commodities exchanges acknowledge the output volume.
Every unit on this chart started as raw rock. You changed that. The market did the rest.
The rings gave up these materials reluctantly. Laser cutters and patience did the negotiating.
